ChangeRequest.name: Change to the Domains related to the Fair Value Option Designation
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!--See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab)-->
### Overview
In the LDM, we have two Domains related to the Fair Value Option Designation, with the below Allowed Values (the codes are aligned to those in the ROL):
- **Fair value designation** - Management on a fair value basis (2) - Management of credit risk. Upon designation (5) - Management of credit risk. After the designation (6) - **Finrep subdomain for financial assets** - Accounting mismatch (1) - Management for credit risk (4) - Management of credit risk. Upon designation (5)
The current ROL hierarchy for this Domain can be found [here](https://sdd.ecb.de/bybusinessid/member_hierarchy/FVO_DSGNTN_HIER_1). This hierarchy includes the following Allowed Values:
- Accounting mismatch (1) - Management on a fair value basis (2) - **Hybrid contract (3)** - Management for credit risk (4) - Management of credit risk. Upon designation (5) - Management of credit risk. After the designation (6)
### Contact person
@Maria_Manuel.Henriques
### Description of change request
Change the allowed values of the Domain "Fair value option designation" to include the following allowed values:
- Accounting mismatch (1) - Management on a fair value basis (2) - **Hybrid contract (3)** - Management of credit risk. Upon designation (5) - Management of credit risk. After the designation (6)
This includes:
- The creation of Hybrid contract (3). - FVO_DSGNTN_4 is shouldn't be added considering that is the parent of FVO_DSGNTN_5 and FVO_DSGNTN_6. - The Domain "Finrep subdomain for financial assets" should be deleted.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
Domain: Fair value option designation
### Forward Engineering considerations
_\[Other considerations\]_
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
